title: Engineered as Infrastructure, Not a Casino Trick
subtitle: Every layer of CodeCroupier is open to scrutiny — nothing here asks you to just take our word for it.

items.title: On-Chain Game Logic
items.description: Roulette outcomes are generated by smart-contract logic that anyone can review — not a hidden backend.

items.title: Non-Custodial by Design
items.description: Your C-Chip balance stays in your own wallet. CodeCroupier never takes custody of your funds.

items.title: Live Contract Events
items.description: Every spin, bet, and settlement emits a verifiable on-chain event you can trace independently.

items.title: Transparent Odds
items.description: House edge and payout tables are published up front — no hidden terms, no shifting odds.
